scripts.lint: npx stylelint style.css && npx htmlhint index.html && npx eslint .
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('dist/assets',{recursive:true});" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');function cp(s,d){if(fs.statSync(s).isDirectory()){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s))cp(path.join(s,f),path.join(d,f));}else fs.copyFileSync(s,d);}cp('assets','dist/assets');fs.copyFileSync('robots.txt','dist/robots.txt');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('dist/assets/languages.json',JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('assets/languages.json','utf8'))))" && terser script.js -o dist/script.js --compress --mangle && cleancss -o dist/style.css style.css && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-optional-tags --minify-css true --minify-js true index.html -o dist/index.html && html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --remove-optional-tags --minify-css true --minify-js true 404.html -o dist/404.html
